questions.question: Which bank signed the Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for the Defense Salary Package (DSP) plan with the Indian Air Force?
questions.explanation: The Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) between State Bank of India (SBI) and the Indian Air Force for the Defence Salary Package (DSP) plan has been extended.

questions.question: Who is the Chairman and Managing Director (CMD) of NHPC?
questions.explanation: Yamuna Kumar Chaubey has been appointed as Chairman and Managing Director (CMD) of NHPC. He succeeded Abhay Kumar Singh.

questions.question: Who has collaborated with the Indian Railways Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) to offer a “travel now, pay later” (TNPL) payment option?
questions.explanation: AI-driven financial wellness platform CASHe has partnered with Indian Railways Catering and Tourism Corporation (IRCTC) to provide a ’travel now pay later’ (TNPL) payment option on its travel app IRCTC Rail Connect.

questions.question: Who has been appointed president of the Society of Indian Automobile Manufacturers (SIAM) for the fiscal year 2022-23?
questions.explanation: Auto industry body Society of Indian Automobile Manufacturers has elected Vinod Aggarwal as its new president for 2022-23.

questions.question: Which two media companies recently announced the sale of its three Hindi channels in order to resolve any anti-competitive issues stemming from their proposed merger?
questions.explanation: Sony and Zee media groups agreed to sell their three Hindi channels to address possible anti-competition concerns originating from their proposed merger. The three Hindi channels that will be sold by the Sony and Zee media groups are: Big Magic Zee Action Zee Classic

questions.question: Which of the following companies becomes the first in history to lose a market capitalization of USD 1 trillion?
questions.explanation: Amazon.com Inc. is the world’s first public company to lose a trillion dollars in market value as a combination of rising inflation, tightening monetary policies and disappointing earnings updates triggered a historic selloff in the stock this year.

questions.question: Which of the following banks was the first to introduce Loan Against Deposits (LAD) and Dollar Bonds for NRI clients at its GIFT City, Gujarat branch?
questions.explanation: ICICI Bank has launched two new products– Loan Against Deposits (LAD) and Dollar Bonds– for NRI customers at its branch in GIFT City, the Gujarat-based emerging global financial and IT services hub. ICICI Bank is the first bank to offer these products in GIFT City.

questions.question: In which city did the United Nations’ Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) organize the inauguration event for the International Year of Millets 2023?
questions.explanation: The Food and Agriculture Organization (FAO) of the United Nations, organized an opening ceremony for the International Year of Millets 2023 in Rome, Italy.

questions.question: What is the name of the medium-term strategic framework of the Reserve Bank of India for the period Shri Shaktikanta Das launched in 2023-2025?
questions.explanation: The Reserve Bank of India’s Medium-term Strategy Framework for the period 2023-2025 – Utkarsh 2.0– was launched by Shri Shaktikanta Das, Governor, RBI.

questions.question: According to the Coffee Board of India, overall coffee exports from India would increase by how many percent to 4 lakh tonnes in 2022?
questions.explanation: According to the Coffee Board of India, the total export of coffee from India rose by 1.66 percent to 4 lakh tonnes in 2022 mainly due to the increase in instant coffee exports and re-exports.
